# jamfprotect_prevent_lists (Data Source)

Retrieves a list of all prevent lists in Jamf Protect.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# List all prevent lists in Jamf Protect.
data "jamfprotect_prevent_lists" "all" {}

# Output the names and types of all prevent lists.
output "prevent_list_summary" {
  value = [for pl in data.jamfprotect_prevent_lists.all.prevent_lists : {
    name = pl.name
    type = pl.type
  }]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `prevent_lists` (Attributes List) The list of prevent lists. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--prevent_lists))

<a id="nestedatt--prevent_lists"></a>
### Nested Schema for `prevent_lists`

Read-Only:

- `created` (String) The creation timestamp.
- `description` (String) A description of the prevent list.
- `entry_count` (Number) The number of entries in the list.
- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the prevent list.
- `list` (List of String) The entries in the prevent list.
- `name` (String) The name of the prevent list.
- `type` (String) The type of prevent list.
